## Claims

1. python -m mypy promptverge/emit.py reports Success: no issues found — the new emit module has no type errors after adding flashcore.* and duckdb to mypy overrides
2. pyproject.toml [[tool.mypy.overrides]] now covers flashcore.* duckdb spacy zshot.* jsonschema — all modules imported by promptverge that lack shipped stubs
3. No existing tests were modified or deleted during this change.
4. write_cards_to_flashdb() is importable from promptverge.emit — python -c 'from promptverge.emit import write_cards_to_flashdb; print(ok)' exits 0
5. empty batch returns 0 without opening FlashcardDatabase — confirmed by test_empty_batch_returns_zero_without_opening_db_guards_against_b3
6. FLASH_DB_PATH env var is consulted before the default path — confirmed by test_env_var_flash_db_path_overrides_default
7. lock contention triggers retry up to _LOCK_RETRIES times then re-raises — confirmed by test_retry_fires_on_lock_contention and test_reraised_after_lock_retry_exhausted
8. non-lock CardOperationError re-raises immediately (call_count == 1) — confirmed by test_non_lock_error_not_retried_guards_against_b7
9. grep -En '/api/v1/cards|kernel.*create|POST.*cards' promptverge/emit.py returns zero matches — no kernel endpoint referenced
